description: Conexeu Sciences Inc. develops collagen-based regenerative tissue scaffold products for applications in medical aesthetics and tissue repair. The company provides patented collagen-based scaffold products, including a collagen extracellular matrix (ECM) scaffold platform for use in medical aesthetics, wound care, tissue repair, facial rejuvenation, and large-volume body contouring such as face, breast, and butt volume restoration. Its CXU collagen gel is an investigational product targeting therapeutic and aesthetic indications, supporting tissue regeneration and aiming to minimize inflammatio
